title: AttemptEndedPayload
description: A race attempt closed (ADR-10). 'won' fires when the win-condition milestone lands (first crafted iron pickaxe, occurredAt order, UUIDv7 tiebreak); the winning* fields then point back into the ledger so the victory claim is replayable evidence, not narration. The honestRace block carries the no-pollution assertion as recorded deltas over the attempt window — consumers (and the video captions) assert both are zero rather than trusting the footage. Producer: minecraft-service on world.events; aggregate is the Attempt.

outcome.description: won = the win milestone landed; stalled = the harness's stall watchdog gave up (soak data, not failure noise); aborted = the operator ended the take.

winningEventId.description: eventId of the winning ActionCompleted{craft:iron_pickaxe} — the ledger-proof pointer; null unless outcome is won.

durationSeconds.description: Wall-clock seconds from AttemptStarted to this event.

budgetTrippedDelta.description: civ_llm_budget_tripped increase over the attempt window; an honest race requires 0 (a tripped breaker means FakeProvider was deliberating).

fakeProviderDelta.description: Count of fake-provider decisions over the attempt window; an honest race requires 0.
